Everything Everywhere All At Once (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $77,169,474Details
International Box Office $67,816,884
Worldwide Box Office $144,986,358
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,922,507
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,925,402
Total $16,847,909
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A sci-fi action adventure about an exhausted Chinese American woman who can’t seem to finish her taxes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$501,305 (0.6% of total gross)
Legs:12.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:10 opening theaters/2,220 max. theaters, 13.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $87,344,466

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 25th, 2022 (Limited) by A24
April 8th, 2022 (Expands Wide) by A24
January 27th, 2023 (Wide) by A24
August 28th, 2024 (IMAX) by A24
International Releases: April 7th, 2022 (Wide), released as Всё везде и сразу (Russia (CIS))
April 7th, 2022 (Wide), released as Tudo em Todo o Lado ao Mesmo Tempo (Portugal)
April 8th, 2022 (Wide), released as Her Şey Her Yerde Aynı Anda (Turkey)
April 14th, 2022 (Limited) (Australia)
April 14th, 2022 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: June 6th, 2022 by A24
MPA Rating: R for some violence, sexual material and language.
(Rating bulletin 2711 (cert #53253), 12/15/2021)
Running Time: 146 minutes
Award nomination: 2023 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Critics’ Choice Winner Best Director, Critics’ Choice Winner Best Picture, Directors Guild of America Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Theatrical Feature Film Winner, Oscars Best Picture Winner, Producers Guild of America Best Theatrical Motion Picture Winner, Screen Actors Guild Outstanding Performance by a Cast in a Motion Picture Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Plot point: Alternative Dimensions / Parallel universe
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: A24, Ley Line, IAC Films, AGBO
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A sci-fi action adventure about an exhausted Chinese American woman who can’t seem to finish her taxes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$501,305 (0.6% of total gross)
Legs:12.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:10 opening theaters/2,220 max. theaters, 13.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $87,344,466

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 25th, 2022 (Limited) by A24

August 28th, 2024 (IMAX) by A24
International Releases: April 7th, 2022 (Wide), released as Всё везде и сразу (Russia (CIS))
April 7th, 2022 (Wide), released as Tudo em Todo o Lado ao Mesmo Tempo (Portugal)

April 14th, 2022 (Limited) (Australia)

MPA Rating: R for some violence, sexual material and language.

Running Time: 146 minutes
Award nomination: 2023 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Critics’ Choice Winner Best Director, Critics’ Choice Winner Best Picture, Directors Guild of America Outstanding Directorial Achievement in Theatrical Feature Film Winner, Oscars Best Picture Winner, Producers Guild of America Best Theatrical Motion Picture Winner, Screen Actors Guild Outstanding Performance by a Cast in a Motion Picture Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Plot point: Alternative Dimensions / Parallel universe
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: A24, Ley Line, IAC Films, AGBO
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
